raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context first","name":"Before we get into specifics, what's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Lets Nina set the frame before the manager narrows in on load, priorities, or support.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Load after push","name":"Now that the sprint pressure has eased, where is your load actually sitting?","description":"Separates a temporary push from a continuing capacity problem without assuming burnout.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Work that lingers","name":"What's still taking more of your headspace than you'd like?","description":"Surfaces the hidden cost of recent delivery and whether anything is still carrying over.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-offs now","name":"What are you choosing to say no to this week?","description":"Forces a concrete prioritisation trade-off instead of a generic priorities recap.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Visible ownership","name":"Where do you want more visible ownership on the frontend work?","description":"Gets at recognition and influence without asking whether she feels appreciated.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stuck context","name":"What context are you missing when decisions get stuck?","description":"Probes the specific information gap behind blocked influence or slow decisions.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision rights","name":"Where do you feel least able to steer the work yourself?","description":"Surfaces where decision-making authority or influence is thin in practice.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support shape","name":"What kind of support from me would actually help this fortnight?","description":"Turns the check-in toward concrete manager help rather than vague reassurance.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"Given what we've covered, what would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes on practical next steps that reduce load or friction without opening a new topic.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
